visualizerParams.title: Bug Squasher: Is Odd Not Operator
visualizerParams.problemDescription: The function correctly identifies even numbers but is missing a logical negation for odd numbers.
visualizerParams.buggyCode: function isOdd(number) {\n  return number % 2 === 0; // Bug: this checks if even\n}

solution.explanation: To check if a number is odd, you check if the remainder when divided by 2 is NOT zero.
